name: Beer-Steamed Shrimp with Tomato Sauce
recipeIngredient: 6 Tomatoes, seeded and cut into chunks
1/2 Red or yellow bell pepper, diced
2 pounds Shrimp, shelled and tails left on
recipeInstructions:
1. Make salsa: Sprinkle salt over tomatoes in a colander and toss gently. Let drain 10 minutes.
2. Combine bell pepper, jalapenos, onion, scallions, garlic, parsley, fresh ground pepper, and lime juice in a mixing bowl. Toss gently and stir in drained tomatoes. Let stand at room temperature for 30-60 minutes.
3. Shrimp: Heat beer and crab boil seasoning to boiling in the bottom of a steamer. Place shrimp in the steaming rack and steam tightly covered for 2 minutes. Stir once, then continue to steam just until shrimp turn pink, about 1-2 more minutes.
4. Transfer shrimp to a serving platter. If salsa is too watery, pour off excess liquid. Add salsa to shrimp and toss to combine. Serve hot, at room temperature, or chilled.
